name: Watershed Segmentation and Object Separation
description: Perform watershed segmentation on the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image to separate touching objects. Record the object count both before and after applying the watershed algorithm. Save the individual measurements of the separated objects to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/watershed_measurements.csv'. Create a summary text file at '~/ImageJ_Data/results/watershed_summary.txt' documenting the object count before watershed, the object count after watershed, and the difference representing the number of new objects resolved.
